title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Sanofi India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Sanofi India
jsonLd.description:
Sanofi India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Pune office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sanofi India:
Sanofi India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sanofi India!
